---
title: "<i>Chambers’s Journal</i>"
---

## <i>Chambers’s Journal</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This journal was founded in 1832 as <i>Chambers’ Edinburgh Journal</i> and became in 1854  <i>Chambers's Journal of Popular Literature, Science and Arts, </i>under which name it ran until 1897. CMY refers to it in No 49 and also Nos 56, 124, 127.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
